Chronology of every recorded fact about [[gate (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — A Traveler can dissipate their Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — A Gate can be used to transport people and was opened by Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — A Gate is an opening between the world and a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon can tear open a Gate by reaching through his sword to Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — The Gate shrunk steadily as it sealed itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — A Gate to a red cavern appeared in front of Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — A Gate is a defensive structure or portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — A Gate can be used for Traveling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — The Travelers will attack Simon if they see him try to open a Gate.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Gate can open onto a clearing or near a Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — A Gate can be used to travel between Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The frozen horn can be used to close Gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah uses a Gate to return home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — A Gate appeared in midair, crackling white at the edges and showing a deep green forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — A Gate can be cut open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is unable to stop long enough to open a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — A Gate is something that requires strength to open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — A Gate leads to a room in the royal palace in Cana.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Leah can shove people through a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — A Helgard Incarnation cannot open a Gate to another Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Gate is a swirling object that shines like pure sunlight and can follow Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — An angry red Gate is behind the giant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial may have vanished into a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Gate was clean and white.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
